descriptionInUI: Replaces vanilla ground AI on the front line with formation-keeping units that fight prolonged, scripted firefights, so the FLOT feels alive. Player CAS is the real source of attrition.

specificOptions.nameInUI: StormTrooper AI (longer cinematic firefights; ground units hidden from AI sensors)
Enable F10 'Troops in Contact' radio menu
Minutes between advance bounds (each bound jittered ±25%)
Ambient suppressive fire (tracers toward enemies without line of sight)
